description: Visit and navigate ten Eastern Suburbs car parks. Enter, drive slowly through, and exit — supervisor confirms each first completion.

combo_badges.name: Weekend Warrior
combo_badges.note: Navigate any beach car park on Saturday or Sunday.

car_parks.name: Sydney Opera House Car Park
car_parks.description: CBD multi-level parking — good free-zone starter for ramps, ticketing, and tight turns.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Enter and exit via marked ramps; practise mirror checks and slow speed on spiral levels.

car_parks.name: East Village Zetland
car_parks.description: Modern shopping-centre car park with marked bays and moderate pedestrian traffic.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Practise finding a bay, slowing for pedestrians, and reversing out with head checks.

car_parks.name: Royal Randwick Shopping Centre
car_parks.description: Busy suburban shopping-centre parking with ramps and tight aisles.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Good for angle parking practice; watch for cars reversing out of bays.

car_parks.name: Rose Bay Village Car Park
car_parks.description: Smaller village-scale lot near shops and cafés — lower pressure than beach parking.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Ideal early car-park badge; practise entering off a busy road and securing the car.

car_parks.name: Double Bay Civic Car Park
car_parks.description: Harbour-side civic parking with steady shopper traffic and narrow aisles.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Watch for pedestrians crossing between parked cars; practise smooth low-speed steering.

car_parks.name: Westfield Bondi Junction
car_parks.description: Large multi-storey centre car park — ramps, levels, and heavy weekend traffic.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Platinum-tier practice. Daylight first. Follow level signs; keep left on ramps.

car_parks.name: Bondi Beach Car Park
car_parks.description: High-traffic beach parking on Campbell Parade — tourists, buses, and tight turns.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Avoid peak summer weekends for a first attempt; emphasise scanning and patience.

car_parks.name: Coogee Beach Car Park
car_parks.description: Coastal beach lot near Brooke Street — steady pedestrian flow to the sand.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Good mid-tier beach badge; practise reversing from a bay if space allows.

car_parks.name: Bronte Beach Car Park
car_parks.description: Smaller beach car park at the base of the Bronte cliff road.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Approach via narrow coastal roads; good paired practice with coastal driving.

car_parks.name: Maroubra Beach Car Park
car_parks.description: Southern coastal lot on Marine Parade — completes the Beach Pack collection.
car_parks.supervisor_notes: Often easier than Bondi; good capstone for coastal parking confidence.

honourable_mentions.name: Prince of Wales Hospital Car Park
honourable_mentions.note: Multi-level hospital parking — busy, good for advanced practice.

honourable_mentions.name: Centennial Park Queens Park Entry
honourable_mentions.note: Park entry roads and lots — slower speeds, picnic traffic.

honourable_mentions.name: Heffron Centre
honourable_mentions.note: Large community centre lot — wide bays, good for first angle parking.

_meta.coordinate_note: Bounding boxes are approximate for v1. Verify on-site before production.
_meta.visit_vs_navigate: Visit = GPS enters geofence. Navigate = remain inside ≥60s below 20 km/h with motion.
